executive_summary: Deck Verification Services currently relies on manual processes for enquiry handling, quote tracking in spreadsheets, and reminder follow-ups, creating significant administrative overhead. Implementing a CRM with automated workflows and AI-driven intake will streamline operations and reduce manual data entry.

pain_points.title: Manual Enquiry Processing
pain_points.description: All incoming enquiries are processed by hand with no automated routing or capture system.

pain_points.title: Spreadsheet-Based Quote Tracking
pain_points.description: Quote requests are manually copied into spreadsheets, increasing risk of errors and consuming admin time.

pain_points.title: Manual Reminder & Follow-Up
pain_points.description: Reminders and follow-ups are sent manually, leading to inconsistent client communication and potential missed opportunities.

pain_points.title: No Centralised CRM Workflow
pain_points.description: Absence of a CRM means no structured pipeline or automated workflow for managing leads from intake to quote.

quick_wins.title: Deploy CRM with Automated Follow-Up
quick_wins.description: Implement an off-the-shelf CRM to capture enquiries and trigger automated email follow-up sequences.

quick_wins.title: Replace Manual Data Entry with Web Forms
quick_wins.description: Use online forms that feed enquiry data directly into the CRM or a structured spreadsheet, eliminating manual copying.

quick_wins.title: Automated Reminder Sequences
quick_wins.description: Configure email templates and automated reminder workflows within the CRM to replace hand-sent reminders.

deeper_opportunities.title: AI-Powered Intake Agent
deeper_opportunities.description: Deploy an AI chatbot or voice agent to qualify initial enquiries, collect verification details, and book appointments before human review.

deeper_opportunities.title: End-to-End Quote Workflow Automation
deeper_opportunities.description: Connect enquiry sources, CRM, and proposal tools to auto-generate quote requests and update pipeline stages without manual intervention.

deeper_opportunities.title: Centralised Knowledge System
deeper_opportunities.description: Build a searchable knowledge base for verification standards, pricing guidelines, and onboarding materials to reduce repetitive internal queries.

tool_recommendations.name: HubSpot CRM
tool_recommendations.purpose: Centralise contacts, manage enquiry pipeline, and automate follow-up emails

tool_recommendations.name: Zapier
tool_recommendations.purpose: Integrate enquiry forms, spreadsheets, and CRM to remove manual data copying

tool_recommendations.name: Typeform
tool_recommendations.purpose: Capture structured enquiry and quote request details from the website or email links

tool_recommendations.name: Tidio
tool_recommendations.purpose: Provide initial AI-driven enquiry intake and qualification on the website

actions: Audit current enquiry sources and spreadsheet structure
Configure HubSpot CRM with custom pipeline stages for verification services
Deploy web forms for quote requests and link to CRM
Import existing spreadsheet data into CRM
Build automated follow-up email sequences for new enquiries
Set up reminder workflows for open quotes and pending responses
Connect forms to CRM via Zapier to eliminate manual copying
Train team on new CRM workflow and contact management
Deploy AI chatbot for initial intake and qualification
Create knowledge base with verification guidelines and pricing
Review automation performance and refine messaging
Document standard operating procedures for the new workflow
